texts.DatabaseLimit:CasualText1: Hey there! So... I burned through Azure's 32GB free database quota for {Month}.
texts.DatabaseLimit:CasualText2: As a fresh grad running this on the free tier, the database auto-paused until next month.
texts.DatabaseLimit:CasualText3: Don't worry though - all the data is safe! It'll be back up automatically when the free quota resets in {Month}.
texts.DatabaseLimit:CasualText4: Just the reality of learning and building on a student budget! 💪
texts.DatabaseLimit:Footer1: Thanks for checking out my project! 🙏
texts.DatabaseLimit:Footer3: P.S. If you're a recruiter and seeing this... yes, I know how to handle production databases too! 😄
texts.DatabaseLimit:Reason1: Free Tier Limits: Azure gives 32GB storage/month for free. Great for students & side projects!
texts.DatabaseLimit:Reason2: Auto-Pause: When limits hit, Azure pauses the DB (doesn't delete anything, thankfully).
texts.DatabaseLimit:Reason3: Monthly Reset: Everything resets at midnight UTC on the 1st of each month.
texts.DatabaseLimit:Reason4: No Charges: As long as I stay on free tier, no credit card charges! 🎉
texts.DatabaseLimit:Subtitle: Azure SQL Free Credits Exhausted for {Month}
texts.DatabaseLimit:Title: Oops! Out of Free Credits
